subcodes.first_line: O mighty branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! By God, the True One, verily the East and the West, the tree and the stone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع العظیم من السدره المنتهی تالله الحق ان الشرق و الغرب و الشجر و الحجر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
